mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates, directly boosting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate crossing 4.0% signals labor market deterioration and impending recession, causing investors to price in lower earnings and sell equities over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in more than 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or out-of-sample accuracy drops below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real personal spending combined with stable inflation indicates robust consumer demand without monetary tightening pressure, driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to predict positive 60d returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05) in out-of-sample backtests, or interaction term coefficient is insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production in an early-cycle environment reflects improving capacity utilization and corporate profit margins, generating short-term positive market momentum.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no positive correlation with INDPRO acceleration, or Rank IC falls below 0.02 across multiple early-cycle periods.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent growth in total nonfarm payrolls increases aggregate household income and consumer spending capacity, supporting corporate revenues and positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Payroll growth fails to predict positive 20d returns with a t-statistic greater than 1.96, or signal accuracy remains at random chance levels over 3 years.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating inflation above 0.4% monthly forces the Federal Reserve to maintain restrictive policy, raising discount rates and compressing equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in over 65% of high-inflation trigger months, or the negative predictive power vanishes when controlling for Fed rate expectations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts alongside expanding real GDP signal synchronized strength in the housing sector and broader economy, leading to sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined housing and GDP signal yields a negative or zero Rank IC over rolling 3-year windows, or fails to outperform a single-proxy baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a late-cycle phase indicates weakening manufacturing demand and margin compression, triggering negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Negative INDPRO changes fail to predict negative 20d returns with statistical significance, or the signal reverses direction during late-cycle periods.
